name: Neogenator
description:
Legendary Anshin adaptive shield.

While it has charge, it restores a small portion of your maximum health each second. If an enemy has hit you recently, the health regen ramps up sharply. The size of the hit is irrelevant; only being struck matters. The regeneration pauses whenever the shield is empty.

Works best in prolonged fights with frequent chip damage, and is less reliable against heavy burst damage.
notes:
When copied via Sharing is Caring, Deathtrap does not gain this shield's health regeneration.

As with other adaptive shields, it has no elemental resistance immediately after equipping or loading in. Resistance is only gained after taking elemental damage, is lost when the shield breaks, and must be built up again once it has recharged.

The red flavour text is a nod to Henry David Thoreau.

special.description:
While charged: regenerates 0.05% of maximum health per second.

After a recent enemy hit: regenerates 3.0% of maximum health per second.

No regeneration while depleted.

Adaptive: while charged, gains resistance to the last element that hit you, up to 86%.

Traits: boosts maximum health, lowers shield capacity.
special.title: For an impenetrable shield, stand inside yourself.

abilities: Increases elemental resistance against the last elemental damage type received.
